Class GameController

java.lang.Object
scenes.game.GameController
public class GameController extends Object
Controller for the main game world scene. Manages the tile-based world map, player movement, combat, mining, monster AI, ore/monster respawning, and floating text notifications.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    GameController.BuildingType
    The type of building the player is adjacent to on the game world map.
    static class 
    GameController.FloatingText
    A short piece of text that floats upward from a world position and fades out over time.
    static class 
    GameController.MonsterEntity
    Represents a live monster entity on the world map, including its position, AI state, and movement variables.

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    COLS
    Number of tile columns in the world map.
    static final int
    H
    Total world height in pixels (TILE_SIZE * ROWS).

    NOTIF_DURATION
    Duration in milliseconds that a notification message is displayed.

    PLAYER_SPEED
    Player movement speed in pixels per frame.

    ROWS
    Number of tile rows in the world map.
    static final int
    T_BOSS_DOOR
    Tile type: the boss door entrance.

    T_CRAFT
    Tile type: the crafting station entrance.
    static final int
    T_GRASS
    Tile type: grass (decorative ground variant).

    Tile type: plain ground.

    Tile type: decorative path tile.

    Tile type: platinum ore rock (solid, mineable).

    Tile type: the shop building entrance.
    static final int
    T_VIBRANIUM
    Tile type: vibranium ore rock (solid, mineable).
    static final int
    TILE_SIZE
    Width in pixels of a single world tile.
    static final int
    W
    Total world width in pixels (TILE_SIZE * COLS).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameController(Player player, Pickaxe pickaxe)
    Creates a new GameController, generates the world, spawns monsters, and positions the player at the centre of the map.

    Returns the grid of mineable stone/ore objects corresponding to rock tiles.

    Returns the 2-D tile-type grid representing the world map.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameController

      public GameController(Player player, Pickaxe pickaxe)
      Creates a new GameController, generates the world, spawns monsters, and positions the player at the centre of the map.
      Parameters:
      player - the player character
      pickaxe - the player's starting pickaxe

  • Method Details

    • placeRock

      public void placeRock(int r, int c, int type)
      Places a rock/ore tile at the given grid position and creates the matching stone object.
      Parameters:
      r - the row index
      c - the column index
      type - the tile type constant (e.g. T_NORMAL_ROCK)

    • update

      public boolean update(long nowNanos, javafx.animation.AnimationTimer gameLoop)
      Advances the game state by one frame.
      Parameters:
      nowNanos - the current time in nanoseconds (from AnimationTimer.handle(long))
      gameLoop - the animation timer, stopped automatically on player death
      Returns:
      false if the game has ended, true otherwise

    • checkBuildingEntry

      public GameController.BuildingType checkBuildingEntry()
      Checks whether the player is standing adjacent to a building and returns its type. Displays a "nothing nearby" notification if no building is found.
      Returns:
      the GameController.BuildingType of the nearby building, or GameController.BuildingType.NONE

    • isSolid

      public boolean isSolid(double px, double py)
      Returns whether the world position (px, py) is inside a solid tile (rock/ore).
      Parameters:
      px - the x pixel coordinate
      py - the y pixel coordinate
      Returns:
      true if the tile is solid or out-of-bounds

    • inBounds

      public boolean inBounds(int r, int c)
      Returns whether the grid position (r, c) is within the world bounds.
      Parameters:
      r - the row index
      c - the column index
      Returns:
      true if the position is valid

    • facingTile

      public int[] facingTile()
      Returns the grid coordinates [row, col] of the tile the player is currently facing.
      Returns:
      a two-element array {row, col}

    • keyPressed

      public void keyPressed(javafx.scene.input.KeyCode key)
      Registers that the given key has been pressed.
      Parameters:
      key - the pressed key

    • keyReleased

      public void keyReleased(javafx.scene.input.KeyCode key)
      Registers that the given key has been released.
      Parameters:
      key - the released key

    • setLeftMouse

      public void setLeftMouse(boolean on)
      Sets whether the left mouse button (attack) is held down.
      Parameters:
      on - true if pressed

    • setRightMouse

      public void setRightMouse(boolean on)
      Sets whether the right mouse button (mine) is held down.
      Parameters:
      on - true if pressed

    • getPlayer

      public Player getPlayer()
      Returns the player character.
      Returns:
      the player

    • getPickaxeHolder

      public Pickaxe[] getPickaxeHolder()
      Returns the single-element array holding the player's active pickaxe.
      Returns:
      the pickaxe holder array

    • getWorld

      public int[][] getWorld()
      Returns the 2-D tile-type grid representing the world map.
      Returns:
      the world grid

    • getStoneObjects

      public Mineable[][] getStoneObjects()
      Returns the grid of mineable stone/ore objects corresponding to rock tiles.
      Returns:
      the stone object grid

    • getMonsters

      public List<GameController.MonsterEntity> getMonsters()
      Returns the list of live monster entities on the world map.
      Returns:
      the monster entity list

    • getFloatingTexts

      public List<GameController.FloatingText> getFloatingTexts()
      Returns the list of active floating-text pop-ups.
      Returns:
      the floating-text list

    • getPlayerX

      public double getPlayerX()
      Returns the player's current X position in pixels.
      Returns:
      player X position

    • getPlayerY

      public double getPlayerY()
      Returns the player's current Y position in pixels.
      Returns:
      player Y position

    • getFacing

      public int getFacing()
      Returns the direction the player is currently facing. Values: 0=up, 1=left, 2=down, 3=right.
      Returns:
      facing direction index

    • getAnimFrame

      public int getAnimFrame()
      Returns the current animation frame index.
      Returns:
      animation frame

    • isAttackAnim

      public boolean isAttackAnim()
      Returns whether an attack animation is currently playing.
      Returns:
      true if the attack animation is active

    • getInvincibleFrames

      public int getInvincibleFrames()
      Returns the number of remaining player invincibility frames after taking damage.
      Returns:
      invincibility frames remaining

    • getNotifMsg

      public String getNotifMsg()
      Returns the most recently triggered notification message.
      Returns:
      the notification message string

    • getNotifTime

      public long getNotifTime()
      Returns the system time (ms) when the current notification was set.
      Returns:
      notification timestamp in milliseconds
